race.description: Save The Date Friday 7 August Handicap (Bm58)
race.comment: AYE AYE SKIPPER (4) started favourite and looked to have every chance but was beaten half a length last start over this distance at Port Macquarie. It's been a while between drinks but recent form suggests he can take this out. WANJINA ROSE (8) contested the same race as AYE AYE SKIPPER at Port Macquarie recently where she was never a factor after getting too far back in the run. Like the return of Raymond Spokes who has been in the money seven times on the veteran mare. Capable of testing the top pick. LA CACHE A VIN (6) was strong at the end of 1000m here at his latest outing. Gets a sit behind a strong tempo and will be tough to hold out. LOVE RAT (2) stormed home to win over 1000m here a fortnight ago. Better placed over this journey so he can go back-to-back despite the big weight.
